WITH raw_events AS (
  SELECT * FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201227
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210117
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210120
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210125
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210126
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210127
),
engagement_params AS (
  SELECT
    e.event_date,
    e.user_pseudo_id,
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(COALESCE(
      ep.value:"value":"int_value"::string,
      ep.value:"value":"double_value"::string,
      ep.value:"value":"string_value"::string,
      ep.value::string
    )) AS engagement_time_msec
  FROM raw_events e,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => e.event_params) ep
  WHERE e.event_name = 'user_engagement'
    AND ep.value:"key"::string = 'engagement_time_msec'
),
pos7 AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT user_pseudo_id
  FROM engagement_params
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN '20210101' AND '20210107'
    AND engagement_time_msec > 0
),
pos2 AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT user_pseudo_id
  FROM engagement_params
  WHERE event_date BETWEEN '20210106' AND '20210107'
    AND engagement_time_msec > 0
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS distinct_pseudo_users_pos7_no_pos2
FROM pos7
LEFT JOIN pos2 ON pos7.user_pseudo_id = pos2.user_pseudo_id
WHERE pos2.user_pseudo_id IS NULL;

final_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    "trafficSource":source::STRING AS traffic_source,
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    TRY_TO_NUMBER("totals":transactionRevenue::STRING) / 1000000.0 AS revenue_millions
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  WHERE "date" LIKE '2017%'
),
traffic_totals AS (
  SELECT
    traffic_source,
    SUM(COALESCE(revenue_millions, 0)) AS total_revenue_year
  FROM base
  GROUP BY traffic_source
),
top_source AS (
  SELECT traffic_source
  FROM traffic_totals
  ORDER BY total_revenue_year DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
monthly AS (
  SELECT
    traffic_source,
    month,
    SUM(COALESCE(revenue_millions, 0)) AS monthly_revenue
  FROM base
  GROUP BY traffic_source, month
)
SELECT
  t.traffic_source,
  ROUND(MAX(m.monthly_revenue) - MIN(m.monthly_revenue), 2) AS monthly_revenue_diff_millions
FROM top_source t
JOIN monthly m
  ON m.traffic_source = t.traffic_source
GROUP BY t.traffic_source;

final_sql:
WITH sessions AS (
  SELECT "trafficSource", "hits", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS dt
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170616
  WHERE "date" BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "trafficSource", "hits", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS dt
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170620
  WHERE "date" BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "trafficSource", "hits", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS dt
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170625
  WHERE "date" BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "trafficSource", "hits", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS dt
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170626
  WHERE "date" BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "trafficSource", "hits", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS dt
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630
  WHERE "date" BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630'
),
products AS (
  SELECT
    session."trafficSource":"source"::string AS source,
    session.dt,
    COALESCE(p.value:"productRevenue"::FLOAT, 0) AS product_revenue
  FROM sessions AS session,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(input => session."hits") AS h,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h.value:"product") AS p
),
daily AS (
  SELECT source, dt, SUM(product_revenue) AS daily_revenue
  FROM products
  GROUP BY source, dt
),
weekly AS (
  SELECT source, DATE_TRUNC('week', dt) AS wk, SUM(product_revenue) AS weekly_revenue
  FROM products
  GROUP BY source, DATE_TRUNC('week', dt)
),
monthly AS (
  SELECT source, DATE_TRUNC('month', dt) AS mon, SUM(product_revenue) AS monthly_revenue
  FROM products
  GROUP BY source, DATE_TRUNC('month', dt)
),
totals AS (
  SELECT source, SUM(product_revenue) AS total_product_revenue
  FROM products
  GROUP BY source
),
maxes AS (
  SELECT
    t.source,
    t.total_product_revenue,
    COALESCE(MAX(d.daily_revenue), 0) AS max_daily_revenue,
    COALESCE(MAX(w.weekly_revenue), 0) AS max_weekly_revenue,
    COALESCE(MAX(m.monthly_revenue), 0) AS max_monthly_revenue
  FROM totals t
  LEFT JOIN daily d ON t.source = d.source
  LEFT JOIN weekly w ON t.source = w.source
  LEFT JOIN monthly m ON t.source = m.source
  GROUP BY t.source, t.total_product_revenue
)
SELECT
  source,
  total_product_revenue / 1000000.0 AS total_product_revenue_millions,
  max_daily_revenue / 1000000.0 AS max_daily_revenue_millions,
  max_weekly_revenue / 1000000.0 AS max_weekly_revenue_millions,
  max_monthly_revenue / 1000000.0 AS max_monthly_revenue_millions
FROM maxes
ORDER BY total_product_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
WITH all_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    visitId,
    date,
    totals,
    hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    visitId,
    date,
    totals,
    hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170415
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fullVisitorId,
    CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) AS visitId,
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS date,
    CAST(NULL AS VARIANT) AS totals,
    hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170429
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fullVisitorId,
    CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) AS visitId,
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS date,
    CAST(NULL AS VARIANT) AS totals,
    hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170407
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fullVisitorId,
    CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) AS visitId,
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS date,
    CAST(NULL AS VARIANT) AS totals,
    hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170402
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fullVisitorId,
    CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) AS visitId,
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS date,
    CAST(NULL AS VARIANT) AS totals,
    hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170401
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fullVisitorId,
    CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) AS visitId,
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS date,
    CAST(NULL AS VARIANT) AS totals,
    hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170408
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fullVisitorId,
    CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) AS visitId,
    CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS date,
    CAST(NULL AS VARIANT) AS totals,
    hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170421
),
session_level AS (
  SELECT
    s.fullVisitorId,
    s.visitId,
    TRY_TO_DATE(s.date, 'YYYYMMDD') AS session_date,
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(s.totals:transactions::STRING) AS transactions,
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(s.totals:pageviews::STRING) AS pageviews,
    (
      SELECT SUM(TRY_TO_NUMBER(f.value:product[0]:productRevenue::STRING))
      FROM TABLE(FLATTEN(input => s.hits)) f
    ) AS product_revenue_sum
  FROM all_sessions s
),
session_flagged AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    visitId,
    session_date,
    COALESCE(pageviews, 0) AS pageviews,
    transactions,
    product_revenue_sum,
    CASE
      WHEN transactions >= 1 AND product_revenue_sum IS NOT NULL THEN 'purchase'
      WHEN transactions IS NULL AND product_revenue_sum IS NULL THEN 'non_purchase'
      ELSE 'other'
    END AS purchase_flag
  FROM session_level
  WHERE session_date BETWEEN DATE '2017-04-01' AND DATE '2017-07-31'
),
visitor_month AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', session_date) AS month,
    fullVisitorId,
    purchase_flag,
    SUM(pageviews) AS pageviews_per_visitor
  FROM session_flagged
  WHERE purchase_flag IN ('purchase', 'non_purchase')
  GROUP BY 1, fullVisitorId, purchase_flag
)
SELECT
  month,
  purchase_flag,
  AVG(pageviews_per_visitor) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS unique_visitors
FROM visitor_month
GROUP BY month, purchase_flag
ORDER BY month ASC, purchase_flag ASC;

final_sql:
with sessions as (
  select fullVisitorId as full_visitor_id, hits, date
  from GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170715
  where date_trunc('month', to_date(date,'YYYYMMDD')) = date_trunc('month', to_date('20170701','YYYYMMDD'))
  union all
  select fullVisitorId as full_visitor_id, hits, date
  from GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170726
  where date_trunc('month', to_date(date,'YYYYMMDD')) = date_trunc('month', to_date('20170701','YYYYMMDD'))
  union all
  select fullVisitorId as full_visitor_id, hits, date
  from GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170727
  where date_trunc('month', to_date(date,'YYYYMMDD')) = date_trunc('month', to_date('20170701','YYYYMMDD'))
  union all
  select fullVisitorId as full_visitor_id, hits, date
  from GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170731
  where date_trunc('month', to_date(date,'YYYYMMDD')) = date_trunc('month', to_date('20170701','YYYYMMDD'))
),
products as (
  select
    s.full_visitor_id,
    trim(cast(p.value:productName as string)) as product_name,
    coalesce(cast(p.value:productQuantity as number), 0) as product_quantity
  from sessions s,
  lateral flatten(input => s.hits) h,
  lateral flatten(input => h.value:product) p
  where p.value:productName is not null
),
youtube_buyers as (
  select distinct full_visitor_id
  from products
  where product_name ilike '%YouTube%'
),
non_youtube_product_totals as (
  select
    product_name,
    sum(product_quantity) as total_quantity
  from products
  where full_visitor_id in (select full_visitor_id from youtube_buyers)
    and product_name not ilike '%YouTube%'
  group by product_name
)
select product_name, total_quantity
from non_youtube_product_totals
order by total_quantity desc
limit 1;

final_sql:
WITH sessions AS (
  SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170130
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170131
),
exploded AS (
  SELECT
    s."fullVisitorId" AS fullVisitorId,
    s."visitId" AS visitId,
    TO_DATE(s."date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS dt,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(s."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month_dt,
    s."trafficSource":"campaign"::STRING AS campaign,
    f.value:"hitNumber"::NUMBER AS hit_number,
    f.value:"page":"pagePath"::STRING AS page_path,
    f.value:"time"::NUMBER AS hit_time_ms
  FROM sessions s,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s."hits") f
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_DATE(s."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) = DATE_TRUNC('month', DATE '2017-01-01')
    AND s."trafficSource":"campaign"::STRING ILIKE '%Data Share%'
),
home_hits AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    visitId,
    dt,
    page_path,
    hit_number,
    hit_time_ms,
    LEAD(page_path) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId, visitId ORDER BY hit_number) AS next_page_path,
    LEAD(hit_time_ms) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId, visitId ORDER BY hit_number) AS next_hit_time_ms
  FROM exploded
  WHERE page_path ILIKE '/home%'
)
SELECT
  next_page_path,
  COUNT(*) AS next_page_count,
  MAX((next_hit_time_ms - hit_time_ms) / 1000) AS max_time_on_home_seconds
FROM home_hits
WHERE next_page_path IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY next_page_path
ORDER BY next_page_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored 95.0; executed successfully with 2 repair(s); shape: small result confirmed, metamorphic delta=+5.0

final_sql:
WITH sessions AS (
  SELECT
    TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("visitStartTime")) AS session_date,
    "fullVisitorId" AS fullVisitorId,
    TRY_CAST(("totals":"pageviews")::string AS NUMBER) AS pageviews,
    TRY_CAST(("totals":"transactions")::string AS NUMBER) AS transactions
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170602
  WHERE TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("visitStartTime")) BETWEEN DATE '2017-06-01' AND DATE '2017-07-31'
    AND TRY_CAST(("totals":"pageviews")::string AS NUMBER) IS NOT NULL
    AND "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
),
visitor_month_sums AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', session_date) AS month,
    fullVisitorId,
    CASE WHEN transactions >= 1 THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non_purchase' END AS classification,
    SUM(pageviews) AS visitor_pageviews
  FROM sessions
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
)
SELECT
  month,
  AVG(CASE WHEN classification = 'purchase' THEN visitor_pageviews END) AS avg_pageviews_purchase,
  AVG(CASE WHEN classification = 'non_purchase' THEN visitor_pageviews END) AS avg_pageviews_non_purchase
FROM visitor_month_sums
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;

final_sql:
WITH sessions AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId" AS fullvisitorid,
    DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS session_date,
    "device":"deviceCategory"::string AS device_category,
    "hits" AS hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160814
  WHERE "date" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId" AS fullvisitorid,
    DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS session_date,
    "device":"deviceCategory"::string AS device_category,
    "hits" AS hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20161114
  WHERE "date" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId" AS fullvisitorid,
    DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS session_date,
    "device":"deviceCategory"::string AS device_category,
    "hits" AS hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160822
  WHERE "date" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId" AS fullvisitorid,
    DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS session_date,
    "device":"deviceCategory"::string AS device_category,
    "hits" AS hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170114
  WHERE "date" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId" AS fullvisitorid,
    DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS session_date,
    "device":"deviceCategory"::string AS device_category,
    "hits" AS hits
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160823
  WHERE "date" IS NOT NULL
),
transactions AS (
  SELECT
    s.fullvisitorid,
    s.session_date,
    s.device_category,
    f.value:"transaction":"transactionId"::string AS transaction_id
  FROM sessions s,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.hits) f
  WHERE f.value:"transaction":"transactionId" IS NOT NULL
),
first_tx AS (
  SELECT
    fullvisitorid,
    MIN(session_date) AS first_transaction_date
  FROM transactions
  GROUP BY fullvisitorid
),
first_tx_device AS (
  SELECT
    t.fullvisitorid,
    t.first_transaction_date,
    MIN(x.device_category) AS first_transaction_device
  FROM first_tx t
  JOIN transactions x
    ON t.fullvisitorid = x.fullvisitorid
   AND t.first_transaction_date = x.session_date
  GROUP BY t.fullvisitorid, t.first_transaction_date
),
visits AS (
  SELECT
    fullvisitorid,
    MIN(session_date) AS first_visit_date,
    MAX(session_date) AS last_visit_date
  FROM sessions
  GROUP BY fullvisitorid
),
last_visit_device AS (
  SELECT
    v.fullvisitorid,
    v.first_visit_date,
    v.last_visit_date,
    MIN(s.device_category) AS last_visit_device
  FROM visits v
  JOIN sessions s
    ON v.fullvisitorid = s.fullvisitorid
   AND v.last_visit_date = s.session_date
  GROUP BY v.fullvisitorid, v.first_visit_date, v.last_visit_date
),
user_events AS (
  SELECT
    lv.fullvisitorid,
    lv.first_visit_date,
    lv.last_visit_date,
    ftd.first_transaction_date,
    lv.last_visit_device,
    ftd.first_transaction_device,
    CASE
      WHEN ftd.first_transaction_date IS NOT NULL AND ftd.first_transaction_date >= lv.last_visit_date THEN ftd.first_transaction_date
      ELSE lv.last_visit_date
    END AS last_recorded_date,
    CASE
      WHEN ftd.first_transaction_date IS NOT NULL AND ftd.first_transaction_date >= lv.last_visit_date THEN ftd.first_transaction_device
      ELSE lv.last_visit_device
    END AS last_recorded_device
  FROM last_visit_device lv
  LEFT JOIN first_tx_device ftd
    ON lv.fullvisitorid = ftd.fullvisitorid
)
SELECT
  fullvisitorid AS fullVisitorId,
  first_visit_date,
  last_recorded_date,
  last_recorded_device,
  DATEDIFF(day, first_visit_date, last_recorded_date) AS days_between
FROM user_events
WHERE last_recorded_device = 'mobile'
ORDER BY days_between DESC
LIMIT 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored 70.0; executed successfully with 3 repair(s)

final_sql:
WITH events AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(t.date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRY_TO_VARCHAR(f.value:type) = 'PAGE'
              AND TRY_TO_VARCHAR(f.value:product.productAction) = 'detail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS product_detail_pageviews,
    SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(TRY_TO_VARCHAR(f.value:eCommerceAction.action_type), '')) = 'ADD_TO_CART'
              OR UPPER(COALESCE(TRY_TO_VARCHAR(f.value:product.action), '')) = 'ADD_TO_CART'
              OR LOWER(COALESCE(TRY_TO_VARCHAR(f.value:product.action), '')) = 'add'
         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS add_to_cart_events,
    SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(TRY_TO_VARCHAR(f.value:eCommerceAction.action_type), '')) = 'PURCHASE'
              OR TRY_TO_VARCHAR(f.value:transaction.transactionId) IS NOT NULL
              OR TRY_TO_VARCHAR(f.value:purchase.transactionId) IS NOT NULL
         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_events
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430 t
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t.hits) f
  WHERE t.hits IS NOT NULL
    AND TO_DATE(t.date, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('20170101','YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE('20170331','YYYYMMDD')
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  month,
  product_detail_pageviews,
  add_to_cart_events,
  purchase_events,
  ROUND(CASE WHEN product_detail_pageviews = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100.0 * add_to_cart_events / product_detail_pageviews END, 2) AS add_to_cart_conversion_pct,
  ROUND(CASE WHEN product_detail_pageviews = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100.0 * purchase_events / product_detail_pageviews END, 2) AS purchase_conversion_pct
FROM events
ORDER BY month ASC;

    "fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS session_date,
    ("device":"deviceCategory")::TEXT AS device_category,
    ("totals":"transactions")::NUMBER AS transactions
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160804
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS session_date,
    ("device":"deviceCategory")::TEXT AS device_category,
    ("totals":"transactions")::NUMBER AS transactions
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS session_date,
    ("device":"deviceCategory")::TEXT AS device_category,
    ("totals":"transactions")::NUMBER AS transactions
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS session_date,
    ("device":"deviceCategory")::TEXT AS device_category,
    ("totals":"transactions")::NUMBER AS transactions
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160819
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS session_date,
    ("device":"deviceCategory")::TEXT AS device_category,
    ("totals":"transactions")::NUMBER AS transactions
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160823
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
),
first_visit AS (
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", MIN(session_date) AS first_visit_date
  FROM sessions_all
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
first_transaction AS (
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", MIN(session_date) AS first_transaction_date
  FROM sessions_all
  WHERE COALESCE(transactions, 0) > 0
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
transaction_device AS (
  SELECT ft."fullVisitorId" AS "fullVisitorId",
         ft.first_transaction_date,
         MAX(CASE WHEN s.device_category = 'mobile' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_mobile_device
  FROM first_transaction ft
  JOIN sessions_all s
    ON s."fullVisitorId" = ft."fullVisitorId"
   AND s.session_date = ft.first_transaction_date
   AND COALESCE(s.transactions, 0) > 0
  GROUP BY ft."fullVisitorId", ft.first_transaction_date
)
SELECT fv."fullVisitorId"
FROM first_visit fv
JOIN first_transaction ft ON fv."fullVisitorId" = ft."fullVisitorId"
JOIN transaction_device td ON ft."fullVisitorId" = td."fullVisitorId" AND ft.first_transaction_date = td.first_transaction_date
WHERE ft.first_transaction_date > fv.first_visit_date
  AND td.has_mobile_device = 1
ORDER BY fv."fullVisitorId";
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored 60.0; executed successfully with 4 repair(s)

final_sql:
WITH sessions AS (
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitNumber", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS dt
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitNumber", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS dt
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitNumber", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS dt
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160827
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "visitNumber", "visitId", "visitStartTime", "date", "totals", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS dt
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160831
),
first_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitStartTime",
    "totals",
    DATE_TRUNC('day', dt) AS day_dt
  FROM sessions
  WHERE "visitNumber" = 1
    AND DATE_TRUNC('day', dt) BETWEEN DATE '2016-08-01' AND DATE '2017-04-30'
    AND TRY_TO_NUMBER(("totals":"timeOnSite")::STRING) > 300
    AND "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
),
converters AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT f."fullVisitorId"
  FROM first_sessions f
  JOIN sessions s
    ON s."fullVisitorId" = f."fullVisitorId"
   AND s."visitStartTime" > f."visitStartTime"
   AND TRY_TO_NUMBER((s."totals":"transactions")::STRING) > 0
)
SELECT
  (COUNT(DISTINCT c."fullVisitorId") * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT f."fullVisitorId"), 0) AS percent_converted,
  COUNT(DISTINCT f."fullVisitorId") AS total_new_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c."fullVisitorId") AS converters
FROM first_sessions f
LEFT JOIN converters c ON f."fullVisitorId" = c."fullVisitorId";
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=metric_first) scored 90.0; executed successfully with 3 repair(s); shape: aggregate shape confirmed, metamorphic delta=+10.0

final_sql:
WITH pubs AS (
  SELECT
    TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS pub_date,
    "inventor",
    "country_code"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE "publication_date" IS NOT NULL
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT
    pub_date,
    "inventor",
    "country_code",
    CASE
      WHEN TYPEOF("inventor") = 'ARRAY' THEN ARRAY_SIZE("inventor")
      WHEN "inventor" IS NOT NULL THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS inventor_count
  FROM pubs
  WHERE "country_code" = 'CA'
    AND pub_date >= DATE '1960-01-01'
    AND pub_date < DATE '2021-01-01'
),
buckets AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(
      'year',
      DATEADD(
        year,
        CAST(FLOOR((DATE_PART('year', pub_date) - 1960) / 5) AS INTEGER) * 5,
        DATE '1960-01-01'
      )
    ) AS bucket_start,
    inventor_count
  FROM filtered
  WHERE inventor_count > 0
)
SELECT
  CONCAT(CAST(DATE_PART('year', bucket_start) AS VARCHAR), '-', CAST(DATE_PART('year', bucket_start) + 4 AS VARCHAR)) AS period,
  AVG(inventor_count) AS avg_inventors_per_patent,
  COUNT(*) AS publication_count
FROM buckets
WHERE DATE_PART('year', bucket_start) BETWEEN 1960 AND 2020
GROUP BY bucket_start
ORDER BY bucket_start;
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored 65.0; executed successfully with 4 repair(s)

final_sql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_harmonized" AS assignee_harmonized,
    "country_code" AS country_code,
    "publication_number" AS publication_number,
    TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR("publication_number", 3, 4)) AS pub_year
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE TO_VARCHAR("ipc") ILIKE '%A61%'
    AND "publication_number" RLIKE '^[A-Za-z]{2}[0-9]{4}.*'
    AND "assignee_harmonized" IS NOT NULL
),
assignee_totals AS (
  SELECT assignee_harmonized, COUNT(*) AS total_patents
  FROM filtered
  GROUP BY assignee_harmonized
),
top_assignee AS (
  SELECT assignee_harmonized
  FROM assignee_totals
  ORDER BY total_patents DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
busiest_year AS (
  SELECT pub_year
  FROM (
    SELECT pub_year, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM filtered
    WHERE assignee_harmonized = (SELECT assignee_harmonized FROM top_assignee)
    GROUP BY pub_year
    ORDER BY cnt DESC, pub_year ASC
    LIMIT 1
  )
),
top_countries AS (
  SELECT country_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM filtered
  WHERE assignee_harmonized = (SELECT assignee_harmonized FROM top_assignee)
    AND pub_year = (SELECT pub_year FROM busiest_year)
  GROUP BY country_code
  ORDER BY cnt DESC, country_code
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT LISTAGG(country_code, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cnt DESC, country_code) AS top_5_jurisdictions
FROM top_countries;
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=metric_first) scored 65.0; executed successfully with 2 repair(s); shape: small result confirmed, metamorphic delta=-10.0

final_sql:
WITH pubs AS (
  SELECT
    "application_number",
    TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS filing_dt,
    "uspc"::string AS uspc,
    "assignee_harmonized"::string AS assignee
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
),
a61 AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM pubs
  WHERE filing_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND uspc ILIKE '%A61%'
    AND assignee IS NOT NULL
    AND assignee <> ''
),
top_assignee AS (
  SELECT assignee
  FROM a61
  GROUP BY assignee
  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
yearly AS (
  SELECT
    t.assignee,
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', p.filing_dt) AS year_dt,
    COUNT(*) AS apps_in_year
  FROM a61 p
  JOIN top_assignee t ON p.assignee = t.assignee
  GROUP BY t.assignee, DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', p.filing_dt)
)
SELECT
  assignee,
  DATE_PART('YEAR', year_dt) AS year,
  apps_in_year
FROM yearly
ORDER BY apps_in_year DESC
LIMIT 1

final_sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATE '2008-01-01') AS start_month,
         DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATE '2022-12-01') AS end_month
),
months AS (
  SELECT DATEADD('month', seq4(), start_month) AS month
  FROM params,
       TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => DATEDIFF('month', start_month, end_month) + 1))
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE(LPAD(TO_VARCHAR(filing_date), 8, '0'), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    publication_number
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE publication_number ILIKE 'US%'
    AND COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(abstract_localized), '') ILIKE '%internet of things%'
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(LPAD(TO_VARCHAR(filing_date), 8, '0'), 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN DATE '2008-01-01' AND DATE '2022-12-31'
)
SELECT
  m.month,
  COALESCE(f.num_filings, 0) AS num_filings
FROM months m
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT month, COUNT(DISTINCT publication_number) AS num_filings
  FROM filtered
  GROUP BY month
) f
  ON m.month = f.month
ORDER BY m.month ASC;

final_sql:
WITH granted_2010 AS (
  SELECT
    application_number_formatted AS app_num,
    publication_number,
    TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(filing_date), 'YYYYMMDD') AS filing_dt,
    TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(grant_date), 'YYYYMMDD') AS grant_dt,
    citation
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
  WHERE application_kind ILIKE 'utility'
    AND DATE_TRUNC('year', TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(grant_date), 'YYYYMMDD')) = DATE '2010-01-01'
    AND filing_date IS NOT NULL
),
citations_exploded AS (
  SELECT
    g.app_num,
    g.publication_number,
    g.filing_dt,
    f.value:citing_application_number::string AS citing_application_number,
    TO_DATE(f.value:citing_filing_date::string, 'YYYYMMDD') AS citing_filing_dt
  FROM granted_2010 g,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => g.citation) f
),
citations_within_10y AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    app_num,
    publication_number,
    filing_dt,
    citing_application_number
  FROM citations_exploded
  WHERE citing_application_number IS NOT NULL
    AND citing_application_number <> ''
    AND citing_filing_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND citing_filing_dt BETWEEN filing_dt AND DATEADD(year, 10, filing_dt)
),
patent_citation_counts AS (
  SELECT
    app_num,
    publication_number,
    filing_dt,
    COUNT(*) AS num_forward_citing_applications_within_10y
  FROM citations_within_10y
  GROUP BY app_num, publication_number, filing_dt
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_utility_patents_with_exactly_one_forward_citation_within_10y
FROM patent_citation_counts
WHERE num_forward_citing_applications_within_10y = 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -80.0; best score among failed candidates

WITH grants_cte AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "citation",
    TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("grant_date"), 'YYYYMMDD') AS grant_dt
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
),
filtered_grants AS (
  SELECT "publication_number", "citation"
  FROM grants_cte
  WHERE grant_dt BETWEEN DATE '2010-01-01' AND DATE '2018-12-31'
)
SELECT
  fg."publication_number" AS publication_number,
  COUNT(*) AS sea_backward_citations
FROM filtered_grants fg
CROSS JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(input => fg."citation") c
WHERE UPPER(c.value:category::string) = 'SEA'
GROUP BY fg."publication_number"
ORDER BY fg."publication_number" ASC;

WITH us_b2 AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "claims_localized",
    TRY_TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR("publication_number", '\\d{4}')) AS pub_year
  FROM "PATENTS"."PATENTS"."PUBLICATIONS"
  WHERE "publication_number" ILIKE 'US%B2%'
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS us_b2_patent_count
FROM us_b2
WHERE pub_year BETWEEN 2008 AND 2018
  AND LOWER(TO_VARCHAR("claims_localized")) NOT LIKE '%claim%';

final_sql:
WITH family_app_counts AS (
  SELECT
    p."family_id" AS family_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT p."application_number") AS distinct_app_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS p
  GROUP BY p."family_id"
),
cn_pubs AS (
  SELECT
    p."application_number" AS application_number,
    p."family_id" AS family_id,
    TRY_TO_DATE(REGEXP_SUBSTR(d."pub_cleaned", '\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS pub_date
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.DISCLOSURES_13 d
  JOIN PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS p ON p."family_id" = d."family_id"
  WHERE d."pub_cleaned" ILIKE '%CN%'
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.application_number) AS patents_in_cn_families_gt1
FROM cn_pubs cp
JOIN family_app_counts fac ON cp.family_id = fac.family_id
WHERE cp.pub_date IS NOT NULL
  AND cp.pub_date BETWEEN DATE '2010-01-01' AND DATE '2023-12-31'
  AND fac.distinct_app_count > 1;

final_sql:
WITH joined AS (
  SELECT
    t1."publication_number" AS publication_number,
    REPLACE(CAST(f.value AS STRING), '"', '') AS ipc_code,
    TRY_TO_DATE(CAST(t2."date" AS STRING),'YYYYMMDD') AS pub_date
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS t1
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."ipc") f
  JOIN PATENTS.PATENTS.DISCLOSURES_13 t2
    ON t1."publication_number" = t2."pub_cleaned"
  WHERE t1."country_code" = 'US'
    AND t1."kind_code" = 'B2'
    AND TRY_TO_DATE(CAST(t2."date" AS STRING),'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN DATE '2022-06-01' AND DATE '2022-08-31'
)
SELECT
  SUBSTR(REGEXP_REPLACE(ipc_code,'\\s+',''),1,4) AS ipc_4,
  COUNT(DISTINCT publication_number) AS patent_count
FROM joined
WHERE ipc_code IS NOT NULL
  AND LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(ipc_code,'\\s+','')) >= 4
GROUP BY ipc_4
ORDER BY patent_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT p.publication_number,
         a.title,
         a.cited_by,
         a.similar,
         TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p.filing_date), 'YYYYMMDD') AS filing_date
  FROM PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB a
  JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS p
    ON a.publication_number = p.publication_number
  WHERE p.publication_number ILIKE 'US%B2%'
    AND p.filing_date BETWEEN 20100101 AND 20141231
),
cited_flat AS (
  SELECT b.publication_number AS orig_pub,
         b.title,
         b.filing_date AS orig_filing_dt,
         COALESCE(f.value:publication_number::string, f.value::string) AS citing_pub_raw
  FROM base b,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(input => b.cited_by) f
),
cited_join AS (
  SELECT cf.orig_pub,
         cf.title,
         cf.orig_filing_dt,
         p2.publication_number AS citing_pub,
         TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p2.filing_date), 'YYYYMMDD') AS citing_filing_dt
  FROM cited_flat cf
  JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS p2
    ON p2.publication_number = REPLACE(cf.citing_pub_raw, '"', '')
),
cited_within_1m AS (
  SELECT orig_pub, title, orig_filing_dt, citing_pub
  FROM cited_join
  WHERE citing_filing_dt IS NOT NULL
    AND citing_filing_dt BETWEEN orig_filing_dt AND DATEADD(month, 1, orig_filing_dt)
),
forward_counts AS (
  SELECT orig_pub AS publication_number,
         title,
         orig_filing_dt AS filing_date,
         COUNT(DISTINCT citing_pub) AS forward_cites_within_1_month
  FROM cited_within_1m
  GROUP BY orig_pub, title, orig_filing_dt
),
most_forward AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM forward_counts
  ORDER BY forward_cites_within_1_month DESC, filing_date
  LIMIT 1
),
similar_flat AS (
  SELECT mf.publication_number AS orig_pub,
         mf.filing_date AS orig_filing_dt,
         COALESCE(s.value:publication_number::string, s.value::string) AS similar_pub_raw,
         TRY_CAST(s.value:score::string AS FLOAT) AS similarity
  FROM most_forward mf
  JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.ABS_AND_EMB a
    ON a.publication_number = mf.publication_number,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(input => a.similar) s
),
similar_joined AS (
  SELECT sf.orig_pub,
         sf.similarity,
         p3.publication_number AS similar_pub,
         TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p3.filing_date), 'YYYYMMDD') AS similar_filing_dt
  FROM similar_flat sf
  JOIN PATENTS_GOOGLE.PATENTS_GOOGLE.PUBLICATIONS p3
    ON p3.publication_number = REPLACE(sf.similar_pub_raw, '"', '')
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('year', TRY_TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(p3.filing_date), 'YYYYMMDD')) = DATE_TRUNC('year', sf.orig_filing_dt)
),
best_similar AS (
  SELECT similar_pub, similar_filing_dt, similarity
  FROM similar_joined
  ORDER BY similarity DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT mf.publication_number,
       mf.filing_date,
       mf.forward_cites_within_1_month,
       mf.title,
       bs.similar_pub AS most_similar_publication_number,
       bs.similarity AS similarity_score,
       bs.similar_filing_dt AS similar_filing_date
FROM most_forward mf
LEFT JOIN best_similar bs ON 1=1;
